column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Covering her mouth with a wide kimono sleeve" | TEXT="あらまあ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Eyes widening with a small, cute gasp" | TEXT="おや、これは" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Dropping her fan in shock" | TEXT="まさかそんな" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Stumbling back slightly with a pale face" | TEXT="聞き間違いかしら" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking around in confusion with tilted head" | TEXT="何が起きましたの？" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding both cheeks with her hands in shock" | TEXT="信じられませんわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="A scroll falling from her hands in surprise" | TEXT="なんですって！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing with a trembling finger" | TEXT="あ、あれは…！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking bewildered in a crowded street" | TEXT="都は恐ろしいところ"
